name: byte5-marp-deck
description: Marp Slide Deck Boilerplate mit byte5-Theme, Copy-to-Clipboard auf Code-Bloecken und GitHub-Pages-Auto-Deployment.

scripts.build: marp --html --allow-local-files --engine ./slides/marp-engine.js --theme-set slides/theme.css slides/deck.md --output dist/index.html && marp --html --allow-local-files --engine ./slides/marp-engine.js --theme-set slides/theme.css slides/spec-kit-demo.md --output dist/spec-kit-demo.html && cp -R slides/assets dist/assets
scripts.pdf: marp --pdf --allow-local-files --engine ./slides/marp-engine.js --theme-set slides/theme.css slides/deck.md --output dist/deck.pdf && marp --pdf --allow-local-files --engine ./slides/marp-engine.js --theme-set slides/theme.css slides/spec-kit-demo.md --output dist/spec-kit-demo.pdf
